conclusion: Confirmed: the mining pipeline contains an explicit MAX_SAMPLES_PER_COMMIT = 3 cap before per-project output writing.

code_evidence.stage: candidate collection -> high-quality sample build; cap applied before writing output

code_evidence.code: if key in seen or per_commit.get(sample.commit_hash, 0) >= MAX_SAMPLES_PER_COMMIT: continue

code_evidence.stage: test coverage confirms intentional cap behavior

stage_trace.raw_candidates: Not persisted by the miner. candidate_samples is held in memory inside javadoc_miner.cli.mine_repository.
stage_trace.pre_cap_candidate_collection: javadoc_miner/cli.py collects all PendingOutputSample objects in candidate_samples before selected_candidates is assigned.
stage_trace.cap_stage: javadoc_miner/cli.py:_deduplicate_samples applies MAX_SAMPLES_PER_COMMIT before _build_output_samples and SampleWriter.write_samples.
stage_trace.retained_samples: Per-project dataset_*/combined_samples.json already contains capped samples.
stage_trace.review_samples: SampleWriter review_samples.json receives only samples that survived _deduplicate_samples; fourth and later per-commit samples never reach review.
stage_trace.per_project_output: Already capped at source-specific dataset directories and final_dataset/final_dataset_extra_3k project directories.
stage_trace.old_combined_dataset: Already capped because baseline was generated through the same cli.py selection path.
stage_trace.new_combined_dataset: Already capped because continuation mine_repository uses the same cli.py selection path.
stage_trace.cleaned_flat_dataset: No additional cap; it loads already capped flat samples.
stage_trace.final_commit_grouped_dataset: No additional cap; it groups whatever changes are present after source mining and merge cleaning.

affected_commit_estimate_note: All 304 commits with exactly 3 final changes are potentially affected. The audit confirms a lower-bound risk set, but only re-mining/a pre-cap raw candidate log can determine the exact full count.
recommended_minimal_fix: Remove or make configurable MAX_SAMPLES_PER_COMMIT in javadoc_miner/cli.py.
Add tests where one commit contains 5 method changes and where one commit contains mixed method/class changes >3.
Incrementally reprocess commits that currently have exactly 3 retained changes, plus any source stats/logs indicating candidate_samples per commit >3 if available.
Merge newly discovered fourth-and-later changes into final_dataset_merged through the existing content fingerprint deduplication path, preserving the existing 3591 changes.
